overview.title: Overview
overview.content: The Extension Marketplace allows you to share your tools, workflows, and integrations with the community. Anyone can register and publish extensions.

aiTool.title: AI Tool Extensions
aiTool.content: AI Tool extensions add new AI-powered capabilities such as filters, style transfers, image processing, and more. They leverage AI models to enhance creative workflows.

workflow.title: Workflow Template Extensions
workflow.content: Workflow templates provide pre-built automation pipelines. They can include multi-step processes for batch processing, social media posting, or content creation.

integration.title: Integration Extensions
integration.content: Integrations connect Iris with external services like Notion, Figma, Slack, and more. They enable seamless data exchange and workflow automation across platforms.

steps.title: Registration Steps
steps.content:
1. Click 'Register' in the marketplace header
2. Fill in the extension details (name, description, type, category)
3. Add relevant tags for discoverability
4. Set pricing (0 for free)
5. Submit — your extension will be immediately available

policy.title: Review & Reporting Policy
policy.content: Users can rate and review extensions. Inappropriate content can be reported. Reports are reviewed by our moderation team. Extensions violating our guidelines may be removed.
